page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5.8xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs utilizing the Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor running at a baseline frequency of 3.4 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, the instance provides dedicated physical execution resources without hyperthreading.

The instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 8.0 GB per core. For local storage, the server includes 7679 GB of integrated solid-state drive (SSD) capacity. This high-capacity local storage is paired with a baseline network bandwidth of 80 Gbps, facilitating rapid data transfer rates between instances and external storage volumes.

From a resource density perspective, the ecs.i5.8xlarge offers a balanced profile for workloads requiring substantial local storage and memory capacity per core. The absence of hyperthreading means each vCPU maps to a dedicated physical core, ensuring consistent compute performance, though this reduces the total concurrent thread count compared to hyperthreaded alternatives. The high baseline network bandwidth and large local SSD capacity make it a cost-efficient choice for data-intensive operations where network and storage bottlenecks must be minimized.

This hardware configuration is designed for workloads such as relational and non-relational databases, distributed file systems, large-scale data warehousing, and transactional processing systems that require high-throughput local storage and substantial memory capacity.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5.8xlarge is an x86_64 server instance running on the KVM hypervisor, designed for storage-intensive and memory-demanding workloads. It is equipped with 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor operating at 3.4 GHz. The instance features a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, ensuring dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading. It includes 256.0 GB of system memory, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core, alongside 7679 GB of local SSD storage. Network connectivity is supported by an 80 Gbps baseline bandwidth. This combination of high-capacity local storage, dedicated physical cores, and high network throughput makes the instance suitable for database hosting, distributed storage systems, and data warehousing applications where consistent performance and high I/O operations are required.

tagline: A dedicated 32-core server featuring 256 GB RAM, 7.6 TB of local SSD storage, and 80 Gbps baseline network bandwidth.
